name: Short Expiry-Clearance: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Beef Chunks In Gravy 415g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully balanced all-natural wet cat food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Gravy , fully balanced all-natural cat food with beef protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein .................................6.5% Fat ..........................................3.5% Crude Ash.................................. 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ............. 0.3% Moisture .........................................82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
